rationale: No new qualitative military escalation this cycle; Iran deal stalemate continues to keep US diplomatic attention diverted, sustaining background risk to Western aid continuity for Ukraine.

top_events.title: Tehran says 'nothing' finalised after Trump claims Iran deal near
top_events.summary: Continued Iran deal stalemate keeps US diplomatic bandwidth occupied, sustaining the background risk that Western focus and aid momentum for Ukraine may be deprioritized.

top_events.title: France-Germany jet plans crash: Can Europe end reliance on US for security?
top_events.summary: EU defense fragmentation is an indirect concern for Ukraine — a less capable European defense industry means slower long-term weapons supply potential, though no immediate battlefield impact.

top_events.title: Iraq's paramilitary groups say they will disarm
top_events.summary: Potential disarmament of Iran-backed Iraqi militias could marginally reduce Iran's regional leverage, indirectly affecting the geopolitical context around Western support for Ukraine; distant and uncertain.
